metadata.description: Canonical sources for real AI models. Source of truth for hallucination prevention.
metadata.note: If a model is not in this list, it does not exist. Do not invent.

anthropic.notes: No intermediate versions. Haiku < Sonnet < Opus in capability.

openai.notes: No GPT-5, GPT-6, etc. yet. Do not invent.

z-ai.notes: GLM-5.1 just released. This is the routing target for claude-glm-router.

deepseek.notes: DO NOT invent V4 — only V3 and earlier exist.

false_models.Claude 4.6: FABRICATED. Latest Claude is 4.5. No 4.6 released.
false_models.Claude 5.0: UNRELEASED. Expected Q3 2026. Do not include as real.
false_models.Gemini 3.0: FABRICATED. Gemini 2.0 is the latest. No 3.0 released.
false_models.Gemini 3.2 Pro: FABRICATED. This version does not exist.
false_models.DeepSeek V4: FABRICATED. Latest is V3. Do not invent V4.
false_models.GPT-5: UNRELEASED. Do not include as real.
false_models.GLM-6: UNRELEASED. Only GLM-5.1, GLM-5, GLM-4 are real.

pricing_ranges.description: Sanity bounds for AI model pricing (per 1M tokens)

context_windows.description: Sanity bounds for context window sizes

validation_rules.rule_1: If a model is not in 'real_models', it does not exist. Do not invent.
validation_rules.rule_2: If a model is in 'false_models', reject it immediately with reason.
validation_rules.rule_3: Pricing must satisfy: output_price >= input_price AND both in range.
validation_rules.rule_4: Context window must be between 4K-2M tokens.
validation_rules.rule_5: When uncertain: ask user or cite source. Never guess.
validation_rules.rule_6: If web scraping finds <5 models from major brands, do NOT invent the others.
